__comment__: Committed Test262 subset. Rollout cadence tracked on issue #69. Compile-mode cooperative cancellation landed via #74 — loop backedges + event-loop drain now call $Runtime.CheckCancellation so infinite loops unwind on timeout. Promise is still held out of compile mode (compiledExcludeFolders) because the compiled baseline regen still runs excessively long in practice; likely per-test IL compile/load overhead dominates, not cancellation. Needs profiling before Promise-compile joins the subset.
